name: Tejas Shanthraj
title: Software Developer | Data Scientist
text: Working under Ashfaque has been a transformative experience, and I couldn't have asked for a better mentor. As a backend developer on Ashfaque's team, I had the opportunity to work with him for 3+ years and 1+ organization. His guidance and vision were instrumental in shaping the projects. Ashfaque is exceptionally skilled at breaking down complex problems and guiding the team towards efficient, scalable solutions. He has an incredible ability to see the big picture while paying attention to the smallest details, which has been invaluable in our projects. He is an inspiring leader who brings out the best in his team, and I'm grateful for the chance to have worked with him. I highly recommend Ashfaque to any organization looking for a dynamic, visionary leader.
relation: Former Colleague at Byju's Think and Learn Pvt, Ltd. and Evergreen Community Pvt. Ltd.

name: Shashank V.
title: Lead SDE
text: Working with Ashfaque was one of the most valuable experiences in my career. His expertise in backend engineering, databases, and cloud architecture is exceptional. Beyond solving complex technical challenges, he has a remarkable ability to simplify difficult concepts and design scalable, reliable systems.What sets him apart is his leadership and willingness to mentor others. He consistently invested time in guiding me through technical challenges, encouraged me to think critically, and helped me grow as a backend engineer. His feedback was always practical, thoughtful, and focused on long-term improvement.He leads by example, stays calm under pressure, and makes well-informed technical decisions while keeping the team's growth in mind. On top of being an outstanding engineer and technology leader, he is a genuinely kind, approachable, and trustworthy person.I highly recommend him to any organization looking for a strong technical leader with deep expertise in backend systems, databases, cloud technologies, and team mentorship. Any team would be fortunate to work with him.

name: Naresh Yadav
title: Senior DevSecOps Engineer
text:
I had the privilege of working under Ashfaque as our CTO, and it has been one of the most impactful experiences of my professional journey. His exceptional technical expertise, visionary leadership, and ability to remain calm under pressure make him a truly outstanding leader. Under his mentorship, I had the opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies such as Redpanda, Weaviate, OpenMetadata, vector databases, MongoDB, advanced SQL, cloud-native platforms, and modern DevSecOps practices, significantly expanding my technical knowledge and confidence.

What truly distinguishes Ashfaque is his remarkable approach to problem-solving. He has an exceptional ability to analyze complex challenges, simplify them into practical solutions, and guide his team with clarity and patience. He leads by example, fostering a culture of innovation, ownership, collaboration, and continuous learning.

Beyond his technical excellence, Ashfaque is deeply invested in the growth and success of the people around him. The engineering mindset, best practices, and leadership principles I learned while working with him continue to influence my career every day. I am sincerely grateful for his mentorship and the opportunity to learn from such an inspiring CTO. Any organization would be incredibly fortunate to have Ashfaque as a visionary technology leader who not only builds exceptional products but also empowers and develops exceptional engineering teams.

name: Fahim Yadav
title: Staff iOS Engineer
text:
I had the privilege of working under Ashfaque Chowdhury's leadership, and it was an incredibly rewarding experience. Ashfaque is a visionary technology leader who combines deep technical expertise with a strong product mindset. He has a unique ability to simplify complex challenges, make sound architectural decisions, and empower teams to deliver their best work.

What stood out most was his approachable leadership style, clear technical direction, and constant encouragement to innovate and grow. I learned a great deal working with him, and his mentorship has had a lasting impact on my professional journey.

I highly recommend Ashfaque to any organization looking for a CTO who can build high-performing teams while driving technology and business forward.
